quotes: Language rules differ by audience: "someone/people with dermatomyositis" for patient materials; "patients" acceptable in HCP materials. Confirm audience in every brief before writing.

rules.intent: Ensure person-first, audience-appropriate language is used consistently and that writers verify audience before producing copy.
rules.rule_text: This guide governs patient (DTC) materials; language must be confirmed against audience before writing. In patient materials use person-first phrasing such as "someone/people with dermatomyositis," while "patients" is acceptable terminology in HCP materials. Confirm the intended audience in every brief before drafting copy.

quotes: Patient brochure = master reference for visuals, messaging, and tone across **all** LISRAYA materials.

rules.intent: Anchor brand-wide visual and messaging consistency to a single authoritative source document.
rules.rule_text: The patient brochure serves as the master reference for visuals, messaging, and tone across all LISRAYA materials; all other assets must align to it.
